name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

---

DESCRIBE THE FEATURE

A clear description of what you want to see added or changed.

USE CASE

Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve?

PROPOSED SOLUTION

If you have a specific approach in mind, describe it here.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you thought about.

ADDITIONAL CONTEXT

Any other details, mockups, or references.
